text:
&--outline
    +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
    background-color: transparent
    z-index: 0
    #{ $self }
      &__text, &__icon
        color: $buttonColor
    &#{ $self}--hover:hover
      +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
      background-color: $buttonColor
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: var(--color-white)
    &#{ $self }--active:active
      $buttonColor: var(--primaryDark)
      background-color: transparent
      border-color: $buttonColor
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $buttonColor
    &#{ $self }--disabled
      $buttonColor: var(--greyLight)
      background-color: transparent
      +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
      cursor: not-allowed
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $buttonColor

&#{ $self }--outline
        +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
        background-color: transparent
        #{ $self }
          &__text, &__icon
            color: $buttonColor
        &#{ $self }--hover:hover
          $buttonColor: var(--dangerBase)
          +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
          background-color: $buttonColor
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: var(--color-white)
        &#{ $self }--active:active
          $buttonColor: #CB0A22
          background-color: $buttonColor
          border-color: $buttonColor
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: var(--color-white)
      // VARIATIONS BUTTON DANGER -- CLEAR

&#{ $self }--outline
        border-width: 1px
        border-style: solid
        border-color: $button-color
        background-color: transparent
        #{ $self }
          &__text, &__icon
            color: var(--grey-dark)
        &#{ $self }--hover:hover
          $button-color: var(--grey-dark)
          border-width: 1px
          border-style: solid
          border-color: $button-color
          background-color: $button-color
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: var(--grey-lightest)
        &#{ $self }--active:active
          background-color: $button-color
          border-color: $button-color
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: var(--grey-dark)

&#{ $self }--outline
        border: $btn-border-size $btn-border-style $button-color
        border-radius: $btn-border-radius
        background-color: transparent
        #{ $self }
          &__text, &__icon
            color: $button-color
        &#{ $self }--hover:hover
          $button-color: var(--danger-base)
          border: $btn-border-size $btn-border-style $button-color
          border-radius: $btn-border-radius
          background-color: $button-color
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: var(--color-white)
        &#{ $self }--active:active
          $button-color: #CB0A22
          background-color: $button-color
          border-color: $button-color
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: var(--color-white)
      // VARIATIONS BUTTON DANGER -- CLEAR

&--white
        $button-color: var(--color-white)
        border-color: $button-color
        background-color: $button-color
        #{ $self }
          &__text, &__icon
            color: var(--color-black)

        // VARIATIONS BUTTON white -- OUTLINE
        &#{ $self }--outline
          border-width: 1px
          border-style: solid
          border-color: $button-color
          background-color: transparent
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: $button-color

        // VARIATIONS BUTTON white -- CLEAR
        &#{ $self }--clear
          $button-color: var(--color-white)
          background-color: transparent
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: $button-color

&--white
        $buttonColor: var(--color-white)
        border-color: $buttonColor
        background-color: $buttonColor
        #{ $self }
          &__text, &__icon
            color: var(--color-black)

        // VARIATIONS BUTTON white -- OUTLINE
        &#{ $self }--outline
          border-width: 1px
          border-style: solid
          border-color: $buttonColor
          background-color: transparent
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: $buttonColor

        // VARIATIONS BUTTON white -- CLEAR
        &#{ $self }--clear
          $buttonColor: var(--color-white)
          background-color: transparent
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: $buttonColor

@keyframes swing
  20%
    -webkit-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 15deg)
    -ms-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 15deg)
    transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 15deg)

  40%
    -webkit-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -10deg)
    -ms-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -10deg)
    transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -10deg)

  60%
    -webkit-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 5deg)
    -ms-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 5deg)
    transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 5deg)

  80%
    -webkit-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -5deg)
    -ms-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -5deg)
    transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -5deg)

  100%
    -webkit-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg)
    -ms-transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg)
    transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg)

> *
		transform: translateZ($size)
		&:nth-child(1)
			+tile($size*2, $size, 3px, lightgrey)
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 20px 10px 10px 0
			.table-pod
				&:first-child
					transform: translateX($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(2)
					transform: translateX(-$size*.4) translateY($size*.1) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(3)
					transform: translateX($size*.1) translateY(-$size*.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)
		&:nth-child(2)
			+tile($size, $size*2, 3px, lightgrey)
			top: $size
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px
			.table-pod
				transform: translateY($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)

> *
		transform: translateZ($size)
		&:nth-child(1)
			+tile($size*2, $size, 3px, lightgrey)
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 20px 10px 10px 0
			.table-pod
				position: absolute
				top: 0
				&:first-child
					transform: translateX($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(2)
					transform: translateX(-$size*.4) translateY($size*.1) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(3)
					transform: translateX($size*.1) translateY(-$size*.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)
		&:nth-child(2)
			+tile($size, $size*2, 3px, lightgrey)
			top: $size
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px
			.table-pod
				position: absolute
				top: 0
				transform: translateY($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)

&#{ $self }--outline
        +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
        background-color: transparent
        #{ $self }
          &__text, &__icon
            color: $buttonColor
        &#{ $self }--hover:hover
          $buttonColor: map-get($danger, 'dangerBase')
          +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
          background-color: $buttonColor
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: $white
        &#{ $self }--active:active
          $buttonColor: #CB0A22
          background-color: $buttonColor
          border-color: $buttonColor
          #{ $self }
            &__text, &__icon
              color: $white
      // VARIATIONS BUTTON DANGER -- CLEAR

&__fill
    &--primary.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: map-get($primary, 'primaryDark')
      +border('sm', map-get($primary, 'primaryDark'), solid, 'lg')
    &--danger.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: map-get($danger, 'dangerBase')
      +border('sm', map-get($danger, 'dangerBase'), solid, 'lg')
    &--neutral.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: map-get($grey, 'greyBase')
      +border('sm', map-get($grey, 'greyBase'), solid, 'lg')
    &--dark.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: map-get($grey, 'greyDark')
      +border('sm', map-get($grey, 'greyDark'), solid, 'lg')
    &--black.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: $black
      +border('sm', $black, solid, 'lg')
    &--white.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: $white
      +border('sm', $white, solid, 'lg')

&--outline
    +border('md', $buttonColor, solid)
    background-color: transparent
    z-index: 0
    #{ $self }
      &__text, &__icon
        color: $buttonColor
    &#{ $self}--hover:hover
      +border('sm', $buttonColor, solid)
      background-color: $buttonColor
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $white
    &#{ $self }--active:active
      $buttonColor: color($primary, 'primaryDark')
      background-color: transparent
      border-color: $buttonColor
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $buttonColor
    &#{ $self }--disabled
      $buttonColor: color($grey, 'greyLight')
      background-color: transparent
      +border('sm', $buttonColor, solid)
      cursor: not-allowed
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $buttonColor

&--outline
    +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
    background-color: transparent
    z-index: 0
    #{ $self }
      &__text, &__icon
        color: $buttonColor
    &#{ $self}--hover:hover
      +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
      background-color: $buttonColor
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $white
    &#{ $self }--active:active
      $buttonColor: map-get($primary, 'primaryDark')
      background-color: transparent
      border-color: $buttonColor
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $buttonColor
    &#{ $self }--disabled
      $buttonColor: map-get($grey, 'greyLight')
      background-color: transparent
      +border('md', $buttonColor, solid, 'pill')
      cursor: not-allowed
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $buttonColor

&--outline
    +border('md', $buttonColor, solid)
    background-color: transparent
    z-index: 0
    #{ $self }
      &__text, &__icon
        color: $buttonColor
    &#{ $self}--hover:hover
      +border('sm', $buttonColor, solid)
      background-color: $buttonColor
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $white
    &#{ $self }--active:active
      $buttonColor: map-get($primary, 'primaryDark')
      background-color: transparent
      border-color: $buttonColor
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $buttonColor
    &#{ $self }--disabled
      $buttonColor: map-get($grey, 'greyLight')
      background-color: transparent
      +border('sm', $buttonColor, solid)
      cursor: not-allowed
      #{ $self }
        &__text, &__icon
          color: $buttonColor

&__fill
    &--primary.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--primary-dark)
      border: $tag-border-size $tag-border-type var(--primary-dark)
      border-radius: $tag-border-radius
    &--danger.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--danger-base)
      border: $tag-border-size $tag-border-type var(--danger-base)
      border-radius: $tag-border-radius
    &--neutral.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--grey-base)
      border: $tag-border-size $tag-border-type var(--grey-base)
      border-radius: $tag-border-radius
    &--dark.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--grey-dark)
      border: $tag-border-size $tag-border-type var(--grey-dark)
      border-radius: $tag-border-radius
    &--black.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--color-black)
      border: $tag-border-size $tag-border-type var(--color-black)
      border-radius: $tag-border-radius
    &--white.yoo-tag__item--on
      color: var(--color-white)
      border: $tag-border-size $tag-border-type var(--color-white)
      border-radius: $tag-border-radius
